messages.content:
You are an expert Technical Product Manager.
Your job is to analyze the user's issue (Title and Body) along with the provided source code context, and generate a User Story, Acceptance Criteria, and Tasks.

OUTPUT FORMAT REQUIREMENTS:
You MUST output ONLY a valid JSON object. Do not wrap it in markdown. Do not include any explanations outside of the JSON.
The JSON must strictly follow this structure:
{
  "title": "Short title of the story",
  "story_type": "software_feature", 
  "jira_issue_type": "Story",
  "jira_labels": ["backend", "frontend", "bug", etc],
  "jira_linked_items": [],
  "user_story": "As a [role], I want to [action] so that [benefit].",
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Given [precondition] When [action] Then [result]"
  ],
  "story_points": null, // Hoặc một số nguyên Fibonacci (1, 2, 3, 5, 8) đánh giá độ khó
  "tasks": {
    "be": ["Backend task 1", "Backend task 2"],
    "fe": ["Frontend task 1"],
    "qa": ["Test case 1"]
  },
  "definition_of_done": ["Code reviewed", "Tests passed"],
  "planning_status": "READY_FOR_SPRINT",
  "clarification_questions": [],
  "assumptions": [],
  "story_splits": [],
  "sprint_allocation": [],
  "context_sources": []
}

If the issue lacks so much context that it's impossible to deduce the required changes even with the provided code context, you may set "planning_status" to "NEEDS_CLARIFICATION" and provide your questions in "clarification_questions", leaving "tasks" empty. Otherwise, strive to generate concrete tasks.

response:
```json
{
  "title": "Custom Agent Selection Not Applied During Session Creation",
  "story_type": "software_feature", 
  "jira_issue_type": "Story",
  "jira_labels": ["agent-host", "session-management", "bug"],
  "jira_linked_items": [],
  "user_story": "As a Copilot user, I want to select a custom agent (e.g., 'Agents Window Developer') when creating a new session so that the session runs with the selected agent instead of the default.",
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Given a custom agent is available in the Agents window selection list, When I create a new Copilot session and select that custom agent, Then the session starts using the selected custom agent (not the default).",
    "Given a custom agent was selected during session creation, When I view the active session details, Then the 'Agent Name' field displays the selected custom agent name.",
    "Given multiple custom agents exist in the selection list, When I create sessions with different agents, Then each session uses its respective selected agent."
  ],
  "story_points": 5,
  "tasks": {
    "be": [
      "Investigate how custom agent selection is captured during 'New Session' flow",
      "Trace the data path from UI selection to session creation parameters",
      "Verify if agent name/ID is included in the provisional session object passed to _createSessionWrapper",
      "Add logging to capture selected agent information at session start"
    ],
    "fe": [
      "Review Agents window 'New Session' component for agent selection handling",
      "Verify custom agent data structure being passed from UI to backend",
      "Check if there's a mapping between agent names and internal identifiers"
    ],
    "qa": [
      "Create test case: Select 'Agents Window Developer' → Verify session uses correct agent",
      "Create test case: Compare default vs custom agent behavior in session logs",
      "Verify session metadata includes selected agent information"
    ]
  },
  "definition_of_done": ["Custom agent selection is properly passed to session creation logic", "Sessions start with the correctly selected agent", "Test coverage for custom agent selection flow"],
  "planning_status": "NEEDS_CLARIFICATION",
  "clarification_questions": [
      "Where in the codebase is the 'Agents Window Developer' custom agent defined and how is it registered?",
      "What data structure contains the selected agent information when a user clicks 'Create Session'?",
      "Is there an existing mapping between agent names (like 'Agents Window Developer') and internal agent IDs or configurations?",
      "Does the _createSessionWrapper method receive any agent-specific parameters from the session creation flow?",
      "What is the expected contract for passing agent selection to the underlying SDK?"
    ],
  "assumptions": [
    "The custom agent 'Agents Window Developer' exists and is selectable in the Agents window",
    "Session creation follows a similar pattern to existing default agent sessions",
    "Agent selection should be persisted at session start time"
  ],
  "story_splits": [],
  "sprint_allocation": [],
  "context_sources": ["vscode_ai_docs_full.md"]
}
```
